product_name: Drywall Compound Pump with Quick-Release Latches
details_overview: Drywall finishers worldwide rely on LEVEL5’s Drywall Compound Pump to be the backbone of their automatic taping tool arsenal. Lab tested to more than 250,000 cycles without needing replacement parts or repair and anodized for extreme durability and easy cleaning, the pump is designed to save time during drywall finishing. Design features include a precision molded flapper valve and seal assembly that minimizes priming, a composite urethane cup seal for longer wear life, and anodized, premium-grade aluminum components that prolong plunger life and reduce seal leakage. Each pump includes an extra‑long LEVEL5 box filler valve (SKU 4‑715), a convenient wrench mounted to the pump foot, and quick‑release latches and pins for easy assembly and disassembly. The pump is backed by Level5’s 7‑year warranty.

The MiniShot Gas‑Assisted Compound Tube enables finishers to apply drywall compound to walls and ceilings with ease. A custom gas cylinder provides powerful back pressure—double the force of competing pressurized tubes—allowing a wider variety of joint finishing tasks (POWERFUL FLOW). The tool uses a no‑twist linear clutch disk, so activation is accomplished by pushing forward rather than twisting, keeping the handle oriented for comfort (NO‑TWIST ACTIVATION). Four adjustable output settings let users match the flow to the job, reducing wasted compound (ADJUSTABLE OUTPUT). It reduces manual actuation, allowing operators to move quickly without repeatedly pushing a piston (GO FASTER). The MiniShot includes a reinforced plastic carrying case for transport and storage (CASE INCLUDED).

This specialized applicator evenly applies joint compound to 90‑degree outside corners. It connects to LEVEL5 application tools such as the MINISHOT™ Gas‑Assisted Applicator Tube (SKU 4‑772), the Compound Tube (SKU 4‑741) or Corner Applicators (#4‑701 and #4‑702). The applicator is extruded from durable glass‑filled polymer and features channels that apply even ribbons of bedding mud to both sides of the corner simultaneously. A longer design eliminates ‘head flip’ when varying pressure is applied. The integrated stainless‑steel universal ball socket attaches to handles from most leading manufacturers, making the tool compatible with many compound applicators.

product_name: In‑Field Repair Kit for Automatic Drywall Taper
details_overview: This maintenance kit contains common wear components for the LEVEL5 automatic drywall taper (SKU 4‑760), enabling quick repairs on the job site. Included parts are: Cable (1 × SKU 7137), Pyramid Cutting Blades (10 × SKU 7111), Gooser Needle (1 × SKU 7040), Brake Pins (2 × SKU 9007), Creaser Spring (1 × SKU 9066), Drive Dog Spring (1 × SKU 7094) and Brake (1 × SKU 7005). Level5 maintains an extensive stock of components—if a damaged part isn’t listed, customers can contact Level5 for assistance. The kit is inexpensive and recommended for taper operators to keep on hand to avoid downtime waiting for replacement parts.

product_name: Semi‑Automatic Drywall Taping & Finishing Tool Set
details_overview: This semi‑automatic starter set is designed for professional use and includes a banjo taper, compound tube, 10/12‑inch flat boxes, a 3.5‑inch corner flusher, roller and handles. Key features include PRO GRADE construction with all the tools needed to complete more projects in less time; GO FASTER capability allowing up to 300% faster operation versus traditional hand taping and finishing; BUDGET FRIENDLY positioning, making it an ideal upgrade for those transitioning to automatic or semi‑automatic tools; GROW YOUR PROFITS by enabling finishers to complete more work quickly while improving quality; and a 7‑YEAR WARRANTY supported by Level5’s industry‑leading warranty program and customer service.
